headline: Zoetis Earnings Preview: What to Expect
summary: Zoetis is set to post its second-quarter results next month, and analysts project a single-digit earnings rise.

headline: Recent Report Shows That Rep. Byron Donalds Sold Up to $60K Worth of Cadence Design Systems Stock
summary: July 15, 2026 records indicate that Representative Byron Donalds filed a sale of Cadence Design Systems (NASDAQ:CDNS), valued between $4,004 and $60,000. According to the July filing, the transaction occurred on June 5,
